news.t: Zacks Investment Management Launches First International ETF: QUIZ

holdings.infoBox: QUIZ is an equity ETF with a total of 191 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.84%, HSBC Holdings at 2.35%, Sumitomo Electric Industries at 1.86%, Roche Holding AG at 1.77%, and Cash & Cash Equivalents at 1.67%.

overview.description: The Zacks Quality International ETF (QUIZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking positive risk-adjusted returns through investments in equity securities of companies in developed markets, excluding North America. QUIZ was launched on Aug 15, 2025 and is issued by Zacks.

data.title: Zacks Investment Management Launches First International ETF: QUIZ
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zacks Investment Management, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Zacks Investment Research with $20 billion in assets under management, today announces the launch of the Zacks Quali...
